text: <par>This Balti word is the source of English <emph>polo</emph>!</par>

<par>< Pers zaxm. When IA languages borrow from Persian/Arabic, j is often substituted for z, so the Balti word may come from an intermediate IA source. There appears to be a doublet with zʌɣʌm.</par>
<par>< Pers gul-e āftāb, lit. 'flower of the sun'</par>
<par>< Iranian (via Indic?) Cf. Pashto qačara, Balochi xačar</par>
<par>< Arabic abraq 'Lapis specularis, talc'? Cf. Sanskrit abhraka- 'mica, talc'</par>
